name: IPlacing
summary: The IPlacing interface is for objects that can have different placings.

methods.name: GetObjects.
methods.summary: Gets the children of the current object.

methods.name: GetObjects(.Type.)
methods.summary: Gets the children of the current object that are of certain types.

properties.name: Placing
properties.summary: The current placing of the object. See PlacingTypes for different placing options.
